mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT q.POST_SN, q.QNA_CTG_CD, q.SECR_YN, q.ANSW_STAT_CD, q.ANSW_CN, q.ANSWR_USER_ID, q.ANSW_DT, b.POST_SJ, b.POST_CN, b.WRTR_USER_ID, b.REG_DT, b.MDFCN_DT, c1.COM_CD_NM AS QNA_CTG_NM, c2.COM_CD_NM AS ANSW_STAT_NM FROM QNA q JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = q.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.CL_CODE = '105' AND c1.COM_CD = q.QNA_CTG_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.CL_CODE = '104' AND c2.COM_CD = q.ANSW_STAT_CD
ORDER BY b.REG_DT DESC ) OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QNA q JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = q.POST_SN

SELECT q.POST_SN , q.QNA_CTG_CD , q.SECR_YN , q.ANSW_STAT_CD , q.ANSW_CN , q.ANSWR_USER_ID , q.ANSW_DT , b.POST_SJ , b.POST_CN , b.WRTR_USER_ID , b.REG_DT , b.MDFCN_DT , c1.COM_CD_NM AS QNA_CTG_NM , c2.COM_CD_NM AS ANSW_STAT_NM FROM QNA q JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = q.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.CL_CODE = '105' AND c1.COM_CD = q.QNA_CTG_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.CL_CODE = '104' AND c2.COM_CD = q.ANSW_STAT_CD WHERE q.POST_SN = #{postSn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QNA WHERE ANSW_STAT_CD = '01'

SELECT q.POST_SN, q.QNA_CTG_CD, q.ANSW_STAT_CD, b.POST_SJ, b.WRTR_USER_ID, b.REG_DT, c1.COM_CD_NM AS QNA_CTG_NM FROM QNA q JOIN BOARD b ON b.POST_SN = q.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.CL_CODE = '105' AND c1.COM_CD = q.QNA_CTG_CD WHERE q.ANSW_STAT_CD = '01' ORDER BY b.REG_DT DESC FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
